growth_records.strain: enrichment culture from Rodrigues-Oliveira et al. 2023 (Lokiarchaea, Asgard archaeon)
growth_records.medium: anaerobic enrichment/co-culture (not stated in this review); enriched from shallow urban estuarine canal sediment, Piran, Slovenia
growth_records.cite: Schleper et al. Asgard archaea: have we found our microbial ancestors?. The EMBO Journal (2026). DOI:10.1038/s44318-026-00719-x. [PMC12993045]
growth_records.snippet: Ca. L. ossiferum displayed a faster growth rate than P. syntrophicum, with a doubling time of 7-14 days and achieving up to 100-fold higher cell densities.
growth_records.notes: Doubling time (7-14 days) explicitly reported in review text (citing Rodrigues-Oliveira et al 2023). Converted days to hours for doubling_time_h field (7 d=168 h, 14 d=336 h) via unit conversion only. mu = ln2/doubling_time would give ~0.0021-0.0041 h^-1 if calculated, but growth_rate_per_h left null since only a range (not a single reported value) is available in the source text and no additional numeric inputs (e.g., OD/CFU time series) are given to compute a point estimate. No medium composition, temperature, or pH stated in this review.
